gist.headline: Pocket-sized intelligence
gist.blurb: Nova.ai just landed in the community showcase. It's an iOS assistant that wires up our text and image APIs so you can generate things straight from your pocket.
gist.summary: Added Nova.ai, an iOS AI assistant featuring streaming chat and image generation, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: The community showcase now features a new example of a full-fledged mobile app built on top of Pollinations infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: An iOS mobile app being added to the ecosystem. Visuals: a retro smartphone or pocket device, the bee mascot interacting with it, maybe a tiny AI face on the screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot hovering next to a glowing retro smartphone that displays a tiny friendly AI face on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
